operational_knowledge_units.title: HMI supports customer-defined calculations for metrics
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states that calculations shown or used in the HMI are customer-defined metrics.
observed_evidence: Bullet: 'Customer-Defined Calculations: Metrics calculated by the customer'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Overall System HMI Calculations slide says HMI calculations are customer-defined metrics calculated by the customer. Calculation types listed are system statistics, bin statistics, and tipper statistics.

operational_knowledge_units.title: HMI calculation categories include system, bin, and tipper statistics
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide identifies three calculation/statistics categories available in the HMI context: system statistics, bin statistics, and tipper statistics.
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: HMI calculations types on the Overall System slide are system statistics, bin statistics, and tipper statistics. These are presented as categories of customer-defined calculations.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: No reusable procedure on HMI Calculations overview slide
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Overview slide listing customer-defined HMI calculations and their types; no buttons, fields, or ordered actions shown.
warnings: Slide is descriptive only and does not provide explicit action steps for creating, editing, or viewing calculations.
procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: Discarded as a procedure candidate because the slide only states that HMI calculations are customer-defined metrics and lists calculation types: system, bin, and tipper statistics. No operational sequence is provided.
